title: coleostephus multicaulis
intro: Coleostephus multicaulis, also known as the many-headed daisy or many-headed trilobite, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coleostephus multicaulis include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in water or oil, and are often used to create teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
